name: @intentsolutionsio/api-fuzzer
description: Fuzz testing for APIs with malformed inputs, edge cases, and security vulnerability detection

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install api-fuzzer\\n  or /plugin install api-fuzzer@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
